title: 6 chmod and chown Commands for Everyday Permission Fixes
summary: Fix common file permission problems faster with chmod and chown commands for scripts, shared directories, recursive updates, and ownership changes.

test_environment.runtime: chmod and chown available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Confirm chmod and chown are installed.
Replace the example user names and paths before running the commands.
Use disposable files or directories first, especially for recursive commands.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/chmod_and_chown_commands_for_everyday_permission_fixes.sh with real local users and paths.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example users and paths, and test recursive permission changes on disposable files first.
